(This pattern can be played all the way through if you want). [/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Summer has come and passed[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]

[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]       [ch]Cm[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]       [ch]Cm[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
